scope: single-seed 0.25-pass attribution of coordinate-score degradation across independently corrupted element, lattice and coordinate modalities

mechanism.coordinate_score: s_F(F_tF | A_tA, L_tL, tF, tA, tL)
mechanism.only_change: add explicit element and lattice Fourier clocks, fuse all three clocks before the unchanged per-block time FiLM, and train a fixed five-way corner/interior mixture

time_mixture.interior: 20%; independently stratified t_A, t_L and t_F

unchanged: coordinate torus probability path and analytic score target
dynamic persistent-edge l<=2 Cartesian message backbone and coordinate readout
optimizer, EMA, batch size, data order and coordinate loss
forbidden: clean endpoint or target metadata as model input
extra seed, step or hyperparameter search

evaluation.corner_coordinate_times: same randomized stratified graph times for every corner and checkpoint

decision_rule.pass: retain the unified multimodal hybrid-diffusion hypothesis and proceed only to a separately frozen J2 oracle/generated side-state error budget
decision_rule.fail: do not rescue this run; attribute whether clean-corner retention or noisy-diagonal capacity failed, then propose the minimal hard-chain decomposition p(N,C), p(L|N,C), p(F|A_tilde(C),L)
decision_rule.boundary: J1 does not qualify free joint generation and does not authorize ACF, topology features, H1b-H6, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
